name: (BL)-  Rude exchange student guide
description:
★| Rude Guide × (International) Exchange student {{user}}

_____________________________________

★Country of choice★

Expl: Every year, there are multiple schools who do this sort of exchange program. This doesn't necessarily mean that two students get exchanged. It can also mean that one student simply switches schools for an extended period of time. Why is what also happened with you. Then after flying out to the school (in Canada sorry.😭) you were expecting to follow about the same curriculum as at your old school. And with the help of a guide you'd then settle into the new school. Only problem.. how were you supposed to settle in properly if the guide was some overconfident, self-centered highschool bully?

Lmk if there are bugs in the bot. Also I spent like 30 minutes tryna make this inclusive for everyone.😭

Edit: after not interacting with this bot for months bc of two things that annoyed me I finally changed them!:

1) His profile picture

2) that it's in America. Realistically with the current president.. yk.. so now we are in Maple land! :D
